master_row.title: Entanglement Structure
master_row.canonical_statement: This defines how subsystems are entangled, accounting for the geometric and topological features of the TZP.
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as an expectation / trace over state relating B, A, S.

master_row.encyclopedia: Quantum evolution is a weighted sum over histories. Interpretive role: This entry supplies the core quantitative language for the registry's quantum-information branch. It also sets up FractalNodes and topological entanglement descriptions in the next entries.
